Cook App — In Development

The Kitchen That Always Delivers

The Avorix Cook App guides your kitchen team step-by-step through every recipe — with photos, quantities, and timings. Consistent quality for half-board operations, regardless of experience level.

Request a Demo Learn more

Free & no obligation

Built for 4-Star Resort Hotels

Avorix is specifically designed for hotels with half-board offerings in Tyrol and Salzburg — properties where the kitchen faces daily pressure to deliver consistent quality for discerning guests.

82%
of operations report a shortage of skilled kitchen staff
2–3×
higher turnover in kitchen roles vs. other departments
0
compromises on food quality for your guests

Avorix — Consistent quality at gastro level

What a Typical Day Looks Like

Morning Prep

The team opens the app, selects today's menu — and immediately knows what needs to be done.

Preparation

Each cook sees their step, exact quantities, and the reference photo. No asking around, no guessing.

Service-Ready

Every dish to standard — regardless of who's in the kitchen today. The result is reproducible.

What the Cook App Does

Step-by-Step Recipe Guidance

Every dish is broken into clear steps — with photos, quantities, and timings. No room for interpretation, no prior experience required.

Automatic Portion Calculator

Quantities are automatically scaled to the required number of portions. No manual calculations, no waste, no errors.

Central Recipe Library

All recipes managed centrally for your hotel — always current, accessible by the entire team on any tablet or smartphone.

Food Cost Control

Recipe-based costing and food cost analysis bring transparency to your kitchen expenses — with no extra effort.

Offline-Capable

The app works without a stable internet connection — reliable in every kitchen situation, including basements and service areas.

Easy to Use

Designed for real kitchen life: large buttons, plain language, minimal onboarding. New staff can get started immediately.

Now in Development

Become a Pilot Partner

We are working with a limited number of pilot hotels. If you're interested in being an early adopter, reach out now.

  • Early access to the app
  • Direct influence on features
  • Pilot pricing
